name: maze of pits
description: I'm in a maze of pits
hints: Almost at the treasure. Go SOUTH or DOWN to find it.
SOUTH or DOWN leads to room 17 where the Persian Rug treasure is. UP returns to room 14.
Go SOUTH or DOWN to reach the Persian Rug (room 17).
notes: Near the end of the pit maze. SOUTH or DOWN leads to room 17 (Persian Rug). UP returns to room 14.
